sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22267" key="glaukw/lenos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλαυκ-ώλενος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of Tethys, <sense id="n22267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with sea-grey arms,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Is.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">148</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
